## Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Assignment Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/<name>` or `defect/<name>`.
- [ ] Pull Request targets `develop`, except release PRs from `develop` to `main`.
- [ ] Commit messages follow `<type>: <short description>`.
- [ ] Another team member reviewed this Pull Request.
- [ ] Relevant tests were run or test evidence is attached.
- [ ] `README.md` was updated if setup, API, Swagger, or project scope changed.
- [ ] Swagger/OpenAPI documentation was updated if REST endpoints changed.
